metadata.note: Small demo subset of public blocklists. Not a full ad/tracking blocker.

functional.description: Core service functionality. No blocking rules by default.

analytics.description: Common web analytics and usage tracking services (inspired by OISD and HaGeZi lists).

ads.description: Online advertising and ad-serving domains (subset from OISD / HaGeZi).

personalization.description: Example personalization / affiliate domains (from popular blocklists).

advanced_tracking.description: Advanced tracking / fingerprinting or cross-site identification services.
